note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left buttock wound site, rates 2/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Pressure Ulcer pressure ulcer Left buttock measures 3.8 cm x 2.7 cm x 1.0 cm.
  Wound bed: 64% slough, 36% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Pressure Ulcer pressure ulcer Left buttock — improving.
Plan: Debridement consult ordered. Physician notified of wound progression.

Wound note - Leftbuttock. Meas 3.8x2.7x1.0cm. Mod serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 75% gran, 25% slough. Periwound macerated. Alginate dsg applied. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Kaczmarek notified.
